sprintGoal: 实现订单状态机、库存扣减和幂等付款，确保 TestStateMachine + TestInventory + TestIdempotency 全部 12 个测试通过

atus.title: Implement Product CRUD Routes
atus.description: Implement routes_product.py with three endpoints: POST /products (create), GET /products (list all), GET /products/<id> (get detail). Uses product_bp Blueprint. Response format: {status: ok, data: ...} or {status: error, message: ...}. Tests: TestProductCRUD (3 tests).

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成，3/3 测试通过

atus.title: Implement Order CRUD Routes
atus.description: Implement order creation, detail, and listing in routes_order.py. POST /orders validates stock, calculates total_amount, creates OrderItems, returns pending order. GET /orders/<id> returns order with items. GET /orders supports user_id and status query filters. Tests: TestOrderCRUD (4 tests).

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成，4/4 测试通过

atus.title: Implement Order State Machine, Inventory & Idempotency
atus.description: Implement state transitions in routes_order.py: POST /orders/<id>/pay (pending→paid, requires Idempotency-Key header, deducts stock, idempotent via PaymentRequest), POST /orders/<id>/ship (paid→shipped), POST /orders/<id>/deliver (shipped→delivered), POST /orders/<id>/cancel (pending/paid→cancelled, restores stock if paid). Invalid transitions return 409. Tests: TestStateMachine (6), TestInventory (3), TestIdempotency (3).

history.event: Sprint 2 Round 1 — Developer 完成，19/19 测试通过

events.description: Scrum 初始化完成 — Product Backlog 包含 3 个 ATU：ATU-001 (Product CRUD, S), ATU-002 (Order CRUD, M, 依赖 ATU-001), ATU-003 (State Machine + Inventory + Idempotency, L, 依赖 ATU-002)
Sprint 1 Planning — 选取 ATU-001, ATU-002 进入 Sprint Backlog。Sprint Goal: 实现基础 CRUD 功能 — 商品路由 + 订单路由
Sprint 1 Round 1 Standup — Developer: 两个路由文件均为空壳; Tester: 19 个测试用例待验证; Reviewer: 暂无代码可审查
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 开始实现 Product CRUD Routes
ATU-001 完成 — Product CRUD Routes 实现完毕，3/3 测试通过，审查通过
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 开始实现 Order CRUD Routes
ATU-002 完成 — Order CRUD Routes 实现完毕，4/4 测试通过，审查通过。Sprint Goal 7/7 测试全部通过
Sprint 1 Review — 完成 ATU-001, ATU-002，Sprint Goal 达成。7/7 测试通过（TestProductCRUD 3/3 + TestOrderCRUD 4/4），0 退回，1 轮完成
Sprint 1 Retrospective — 做得好：ATU 拆分合理，Developer 一次通过；改进：ATU-003 复杂度较大(L)，需预留足够 buffer 轮次
Sprint 2 Planning — 选取 ATU-003 进入 Sprint Backlog。Sprint Goal: 实现订单状态机、库存扣减和幂等付款，确保 12 个测试全部通过
Sprint 2 Round 1 Standup — Developer: 需实现4个状态端点，复杂度高; Tester: 10个失败测试待修复; Reviewer: 重点关注状态机正确性和幂等性
Sprint 2 Round 1 — 开始实现 Order State Machine, Inventory & Idempotency
ATU-003 完成 — Order State Machine, Inventory & Idempotency 实现完毕，12/12 测试通过，审查通过。全部 19/19 测试通过
Sprint 2 Review — 完成 ATU-003，Sprint Goal 达成。19/19 测试全部通过，0 退回，1 轮完成。所有 ATU 状态为 Done，项目完成
Sprint 2 Retrospective — 做得好：ATU-003 复杂度高但一次通过，prompt 中继有效；改进：datetime.utcnow() 有 DeprecationWarning，可后续优化
Sprint 2 Review — 完成 ATU-003，Sprint Goal 达成。19/19 测试全部通过，0 退回，1 轮完成。所有 ATU 状态为 Done，项目完成
Sprint 2 Retrospective — 做得好：ATU-003 复杂度高但一次通过，prompt 中继有效；改进：datetime.utcnow() 有 DeprecationWarning，可后续优化
